name: Security
about: Report a security vulnerability
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security, vulnerability

---

## 🔒 Security Vulnerability Report

**IMPORTANT:** For critical security issues, please email security@vantis.com instead of creating a public issue.

### Description
Describe the security vulnerability you found.

### Severity
- [ ] Critical (system compromise, data theft)
- [ ] High (privilege escalation, major data leak)
- [ ] Medium (information disclosure, DoS)
- [ ] Low (minor security issue)

### Impact
What is the impact of this vulnerability?

### Affected Components
Which parts of VantisOS are affected?

### Vulnerability Type
- [ ] Buffer overflow
- [ ] Use-after-free
- [ ] Race condition
- [ ] Privilege escalation
- [ ] Information disclosure
- [ ] Denial of service
- [ ] Other

### Proof of Concept
If possible, provide a proof of concept or reproduction steps.

### Mitigation
Is there a temporary mitigation available?

### Additional Context
Add any other context about the security issue.

### Related Issues
- Related to #(issue number)
- CVE: (if applicable)
